description.pass1_value: Open-source and enterprise ecommerce platform (Magento / Adobe Commerce) providing REST, GraphQL and SOAP APIs for storefront and back-office integrations.
description.final_value: Adobe Commerce (formerly Magento Commerce) is a headless commerce platform for delivering personalized commerce experiences across touchpoints, with tools to create and manage storefronts, commerce content, merchandising, and core operations like product catalogs, orders, and customers.

pass1_value.note: Adobe Commerce as a Cloud Service REST APIs use Adobe IMS (OAuth 2) and bearer access tokens for API authorization (server-to-server and user flows). Older / non‑SaaS Magento docs also reference OAuth 1.0a and admin/integration tokens (see Getting Started), but the cited page explicitly documents OAuth2 and bearer token flows for Cloud.

final_value.note: Official REST authentication docs list Integration tokens (used as a Bearer token in the Authorization header), OAuth 1.0a for third-party apps, and Adobe IMS (OAuth 2.0) for Adobe Commerce as a Cloud Service. (Tool schema supports oauth2/token; oauth1 not represented.)
